study_title: Eye Movements in Code Review: Replication of Kip et al. (2023)
study_objective: To replicate and extend Kip et al.'s findings on how developers' eye movements differ when reviewing code for bugs versus comprehension tasks.
task_description: Participants performed two tasks: (1) code comprehension questions and (2) bug detection in Java methods, while eye movements were recorded using a remote eye tracker.
